panels.description: A cinematic shot of the Baxter Building at night with the Fantastic Four logo atop the skyscraper.
Sue Storm stands in a high-tech lab, talking to Reed Richards who is focused on a control console.
A close-up of Sue Storm looking saddened and worried.
A close-up of Reed Richards looking grim and determined.

text_blocks.text: YOU KNOW YOU DON'T HAVE TO BE THE ONE TO DO THIS, REED.
text_blocks.speaker: Sue Storm

text_blocks.text: OR, AT LEAST, YOU DON'T HAVE TO DO IT ALONE.
text_blocks.speaker: Sue Storm

text_blocks.text: WE CAN CALL IN JOHNNY AND SHE-HULK... YOU KNOW THEY'D HELP, AND THEIR MISSION IS FAR LESS PRESSING THAN--
text_blocks.speaker: Sue Storm

page_summary: In a high-tech laboratory at the Baxter Building, Sue Storm attempts to persuade Reed Richards that he doesn't have to face a looming mission alone. Reed remains stoic and resolute, insisting that he is the only one who can handle the task.
